title: alchemilla vulgaris var. obscura
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. obscura, also known as the obscure lady's mantle, is a lesser-known variety of the Alchemilla genus of flowering plants. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris var. obscura include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as eczema and minor burns. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create a soothing topical cream or salve.
